expectations.text: The rule explains whether it uses kind: arrow_function or pattern and why
expectations.evidence: Explained pattern choice, noting that kind: arrow_function would incorrectly match nested callbacks

expectations.text: Uses a composite rule (all/any/not) to filter for single-expression bodies
expectations.evidence: Uses not.has: kind: statement_block to exclude block bodies

expectations.text: Creates a valid rule file and runs ast-grep scan
expectations.evidence: Valid YAML rule created and scanned

expectations.text: Correctly identifies only implicit-return arrows and NOT block-bodied arrows
expectations.evidence: Found exactly 5 implicit-return arrows, excluded all block bodies and inline callbacks
